text.div: intentionally left empty / not meaningful

tr.td: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Human isophane insulin 70 unit/mL and recombinant human regular insulin 30 unit/mL solution for injection
1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
400 micrograms (1 spray) under the tongue as needed for chest pain, may repeat every 5 minutes as needed, up to 3 sprays in 15 minutes
Metoprolol tartrate (as metoprolol succinate) 100 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Urinalysis with reflex to microscopy and culture
Development of individualized plan of care

ul.li: Achieve LDL cholesterol below 70 mg/dL in a patient with ischemic heart disease and diabetes.
Maintain total cholesterol below 150 mg/dL.
Maintain triglycerides below 150 mg/dL.
Maintain HDL cholesterol above 40 mg/dL.
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg to reduce cardiovascular and renal risk.
Implement dietary changes, increase physical activity, and reduce sodium intake to support blood pressure management.
Patient will engage in a diabetes self-management plan to improve glycemic control and reduce risk of diabetes progression.
Maintain or achieve HbA1c within individualized target range.
Achieve weight loss as part of diabetes risk reduction.
Maintain blood pressure within individualized target range to reduce cardiovascular risk.
Achieve LDL cholesterol within recommended range for cardiovascular risk reduction.

tr.td: Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Glucose [Mass/volume] in Urine by Test strip
Ketones [Presence] in Urine by Test strip
Specific gravity of Urine by Test strip
pH of Urine by Test strip
Protein [Mass/volume] in Urine by Test strip
Nitrite [Presence] in Urine by Test strip
Hemoglobin [Presence] in Urine by Test strip
Leukocyte esterase [Presence] in Urine by Test strip
Leukocytes [#/area] in Urine sediment by Microscopy high power field
Erythrocytes [#/area] in Urine sediment by Microscopy high power field
Epithelial cells [#/area] in Urine sediment by Microscopy high power field
Casts [Presence] in Urine sediment by Light microscopy
Mucus [Presence] in Urine sediment by Light microscopy
Bacteria [#/area] in Urine sediment by Microscopy high power field
Bacteria identified in Urine by Culture
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus

Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg to reduce cardiovascular and renal risk.
